changes.summary: Added PERMISSION_GATES_PORT injection token and PermissionGatesPort interface with evaluatePublicationVotePostTypeGate (inv-05) and isCommentVotingEnabled (inv-19). Documents Phase 3 stub and Phase 5 OD-3 sunset.

PermissionGatesAdapter implements PermissionGatesPort; sole infrastructure import of PermissionsHelperService (V-11 zone-7 exception). Inlines event/project vote gates and ENABLE_COMMENT_VOTING flag matching permissions-helper interim behavior.

PermissionRuleEngine injects @Inject(PERMISSION_GATES_PORT) PermissionGatesPort (not permissions-helper). Added stub methods delegating to port; canPerformAction applies post-type vote gate before Factor 1 for VOTE actions.

verification.tsc: no errors in changed files (project tsconfig has pre-existing TS5101 baseUrl deprecation)

notes: Nest DI binding (PermissionGatesAdapter → PERMISSION_GATES_PORT in permissions.module.ts / domain.module) deferred outside write_set; adapter and port are on disk for follow-up wiring. V-06 product gates remain in permissions-helper for ResourcePermissions until Phase 5 engine merge.
